intro: Calawaya nanegalensis, also known as the Nanegal calawaya, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in Ecuador. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Calawaya nanegalensis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
